title: Proclamation No. 1011, s. 2015
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 1011

DECLARING FRIDAY, 14 AUGUST 2015, AS A SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STO. TOMAS, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL NORTE

WHEREAS, the Municipality of Sto. Tomas, Davao del Norte marks the celebration of the “Araw ng Sto. Tomas” on Friday, 14 August 2015;

WHEREAS, it is but fitting and proper that the people of the Municipality of Sto. Tomas, Davao del Norte be given full opportunity to celebrate and participate in the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, PAQUITO N. OCHOA JR., Executive Secretary, by authority of His Excellency, BENIGNO S. AQUINO III, do hereby declare Friday, 14 August 2015, as a special (non-working) day in the Municipality of Sto. Tomas, Davao del Norte.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 30th day of April, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Fifteen.

By authority of the President:

(Sgd.) PAQUITO N. OCHOA JR. Execute Secretary
